name: THE ETHERIC STATE
core_function: Hardware driver/scaffolding for physical matter. Violet-grey wireframe mesh that holds atoms in magnetic wells.

visual_profile.appearance: Translucent violet-grey cobweb lattice, 'cold' self-luminous light, smoky but structured like silk thread
visual_profile.lighting: Self-luminous only - no external light sources, no shadows cast

health_aura.description: Parallel bristle-like filaments extending from living bodies
health_aura.appearance: Glowing fiber-optic cables under astral sight

etheric_double.function: Voltage regulator stepping down 4D force for 3D hardware

nerve_sheaths.description: Every physical nerve fiber encased in shimmering violet-grey sheath
nerve_sheaths.transfer_protocol: Physical sensation creates vibratory ripples → frequency spikes → astral data translation
nerve_sheaths.delay: E4 processes 0.3 seconds ahead of physical nerves
nerve_sheaths.pain_response: Sheath 'flares' from violet to sharp jagged red

protective_firewall.description: Honeycomb lace barrier between E4 and Astral
protective_firewall.damage_indicator: Tears appear as chaotic neon bleeding into grey

magnetic_scaffolding.description: Sponge metaphor - squeeze E4, physical matter moves

tactile.healthy: Cool silk thread, magnetic pull like refrigerator magnet on skin, sponge-give (0.5mm depression under 5psi pressure)
tactile.sick: Matted fur texture, wilting willow bark (brittle yet damp), cotton-candy drag

auditory.signature: Subsonic 12-18 Hz hum (below human hearing, felt in teeth)

olfactory.healthy: Ozone (sharp metallic electricity) + petrichor (fresh rain on hot asphalt)
olfactory.decay: Wet ash + cold iron for necrosis

e4_to_physical.mechanism: Vibratory ripples from physical sensation translate to astral data
e4_to_physical.master_advantage: React to E4 flash before physical sword moves

e4_to_e3_transition.mechanism: Opalescent bricks don't shatter—they 'de-stack' with crystalline chiming sounds
e4_to_e3_transition.result: Flying outward into cloud of dust before reabsorption into 'Golden Wind'

hazards: Health aura tangling from emotional distress
